title: Construction of CC Road and Drainage Network in Gudiyaari
description: Full-scale excavation layout and laying of cement concrete roadbeds with integrated subterranean stormwater drainage systems across busy market zones.
detailed_requirements: Must possess valid Class-C or higher civil registration with CG PWD and show execution of similar concrete road works in the past 3 years.

title: Bulk Loading and Mechanical Transportation of Coal from Gevra Mine

title: Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment

title: Senior Staff Nurse Openings
